original_query: SELECT MAX(distinct l_orderkey) FROM lineitem where exists( SELECT MAX(c_custkey) FROM customer where c_custkey = l_orderkey GROUP BY c_custkey);
rewritten_query: SELECT MAX(l_orderkey) FROM lineitem l JOIN customer c ON l.l_orderkey = c.c_custkey;

original_query: SELECT MAX(distinct l_orderkey) FROM lineitem where exists( SELECT MAX(c_custkey) FROM customer where c_custkey = l_orderkey GROUP BY c_custkey);
rewritten_query: SELECT MAX(t_lineitem.t_l_orderkey) FROM ( SELECT l_orderkey, MAX(l_orderkey) AS t_l_orderkey FROM lineitem GROUP BY l_orderkey ) AS t_lineitem INNER JOIN ( SELECT c_custkey, MAX(c_custkey) AS t_l_orderkey FROM customer GROUP BY c_custkey) AS t_customer ON t_lineitem.l_orderkey = t_customer.c_custkey;

original_query: select o_year, sum(case when nation = 'BRAZIL' then volume else 0 end) / sum(volume) as mkt_share from ( select extract(year from o_orderdate) as o_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume, n2.n_name as nation from part, supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2, region where p_partkey = l_partkey and s_suppkey = l_suppkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_custkey = c_custkey and c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and n1.n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and o_orderdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' and p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL' ) as all_nations group by o_year order by o_year;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_orders AS (SELECT o_orderdate, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume, n2.n_name AS nation FROM part JOIN lineitem ON p_partkey = l_partkey JOIN supplier ON s_suppkey = l_suppkey JOIN orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey JOIN customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey JOIN nation n1 ON c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey JOIN nation n2 ON s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey JOIN region ON n1.n_regionkey = r_regionkey WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31' AND p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL' AND r_name = 'AMERICA'),aggregated_data AS ( SELECT EXTRACT(year FROM o_orderdate) AS o_year,  SUM(volume) AS total_volume, SUM(CASE WHEN nation = 'BRAZIL' THEN volume ELSE 0 END) AS brazil_volume FROM filtered_orders GROUP BY EXTRACT(year FROM o_orderdate))SELECT o_year, brazil_volume / total_volume AS mkt_share FROM aggregated_data ORDER BY o_year;
note: limitation of sql itself based on shared buffer

original_query: SELECT MAX(distinct l_orderkey) FROM lineitem where exists( SELECT MAX(c_custkey) FROM customer where c_custkey = l_orderkey GROUP BY c_custkey );
rewritten_query: SELECT MAX(l.l_orderkey) FROM lineitem l JOIN customer c ON l.l_orderkey = c.c_custkey;

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'forest%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'CANADA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query: SELECT s.s_name,  s.s_address FROM  supplier s JOIN  nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey JOIN  partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey JOIN  part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey JOIN  ( SELECT  l.l_partkey,  l.l_suppkey,  0.5 * SUM(l.l_quantity) AS threshold_qty FROM  lineitem l WHERE  l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01' GROUP BY  l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey ) AS li ON ps.ps_partkey = li.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = li.l_suppkey WHERE  p.p_name LIKE 'forest%'  AND ps.ps_availqty > li.threshold_qty AND n.n_name = 'CANADA' ORDER BY s.s_name;

original_query: select o_year, sum(case when nation = 'BRAZIL' then volume else 0 end) / sum(volume) as mkt_share from ( select extract(year from o_orderdate) as o_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume, n2.n_name as nation from part, supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2, region where p_partkey = l_partkey and s_suppkey = l_suppkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_custkey = c_custkey and c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and n1.n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and o_orderdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' and p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL' ) as all_nations group by o_year order by o_year;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_orders AS ( SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, EXTRACT(year FROM o_orderdate) AS o_year FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31' ), filtered_lineitem AS ( SELECT l_orderkey, l_suppkey, l_partkey, l_extendedprice, l_discount FROM lineitem ), filtered_part AS ( SELECT p_partkey FROM part WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL' ), region_america AS ( SELECT r_regionkey FROM region WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA' ), customers_in_america AS ( SELECT c_custkey FROM customer c JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey WHERE n.n_regionkey = (SELECT r_regionkey FROM region_america) ) SELECT o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation = 'BRAZIL' THEN volume ELSE 0 END) / SUM(volume) AS mkt_share FROM ( SELECT fo.o_year, fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount) AS volume, s_n.n_name AS nation FROM filtered_lineitem fl JOIN filtered_orders fo ON fl.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey JOIN filtered_part fp ON fl.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey JOIN supplier s ON fl.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey JOIN nation s_n ON s.s_nationkey = s_n.n_nationkey WHERE fo.o_custkey IN (SELECT c_custkey FROM customers_in_america) ) AS all_nations GROUP BY o_year ORDER BY o_year;
